items.title: Premium disruption recovery initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation, trip companion & proactive notifications, operational control tower, and customer care & case management across the Guest Mobile App, Proactive Messaging Layer, Network Control Workspace, and Disruption Servicing Workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase self-service disruption recovery rate by offering clearer recovery options directly inside digital trip journeys.
Increase trip confidence index by making disruption handling more transparent and less effortful.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat guest rate by protecting brand trust in high-stress operational moments.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease recovery decision cycle time by joining guest impact and operational options in one workflow.
Decrease misconnected guest rate through earlier and more guest-aware intervention.

businessKPIs.kpi: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease irregular operations cost per disrupted flight by reducing manual handling and guest fallout.

productBricks.change: Extended Disruption Recovery & Self-Service Reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery.
Extended Trip Companion & Proactive Notifications with recovery prompts, airport guidance, and proactive alert sequencing.
Extended Operational Control Tower with guest-impact prioritization alongside flight risk.
Extended Customer Care & Case Management with disruption-specific queues and context handoff.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced recovery actions and richer disruption visibility in the Guest Mobile App.
Introduced proactive disruption messaging and next-best-action nudges in the Proactive Messaging Layer.
Introduced guest-impact prioritization inside the Network Control Workspace.
Introduced disruption-specific servicing workflows in the Disruption Servicing Workspace.

items.title: Holidays retail and servicing unification initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving holidays packaging & fulfilment, payments, refunds & revenue settlement, identity, profile & document readiness, and trip companion & proactive notifications across Holidays Search and Booking Experience and Holiday Servicing Workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase holiday quote-to-book conversion by reducing uncertainty between package selection and commitment.
Increase documentation completion rate by simplifying family booking preparation and traveller-detail collection.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase holiday attachment revenue by making package booking feel like a first-class product rather than an add-on.
Increase package gross margin by reducing manual servicing overhead and avoidable fallout.

productBricks.change: Extended Holidays Packaging & Fulfilment with cleaner package comparison, fulfilment states, and amendment handling.
Extended Payments, Refunds & Revenue Settlement with staged-payment and package-refund clarity.
Extended Identity, Profile & Document Readiness with multi-passenger and family-travel readiness workflows.
Extended Trip Companion & Proactive Notifications with package-aware pre-travel readiness guidance.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced clearer package, payment, and readiness journeys in Holidays Search and Booking Experience.
Introduced package-servicing workflow improvements in Holiday Servicing Workspace.

items.title: Corporate content control and partner continuity initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving corporate, agency & NDC distribution, partner & alliance journey orchestration, offer, pricing & availability management, and operational data, revenue & personalisation platform across NDC and Agency API and Commercial Account Workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase in-policy booking rate by making negotiated content easier to surface through controlled channels.
Decrease traveller disruption resolution time by preserving continuity across partner and mixed-carrier itineraries.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase corporate revenue share of wallet by improving content control and programme confidence.
Increase NDC and direct business mix by making modern distribution more operationally credible.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase trip confidence index for partner-connected journeys by reducing servicing ambiguity.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Protect direct digital booking mix by keeping own-channel value stronger even when journeys extend to partners.

productBricks.change: Extended Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths.
Extended Partner & Alliance Journey Orchestration with deeper continuity logic for disrupted mixed-carrier itineraries.
Extended Offer, Pricing & Availability Management with stronger offer governance across corporate and partner contexts.
Extended Operational Data, Revenue & Personalisation Platform with account-health and partner-leakage insight.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced stronger corporate content control and servicing signals in the NDC and Agency API.
Introduced account-health and disruption insight in the Commercial Account Workspace.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Corporate continuity and distribution control discovery

items.title: Cargo digital visibility and premium products initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving cargo capacity, quote & booking, cargo tracking & exception management, customer care & case management, and partner & alliance journey orchestration across Cargo Digital Portal and Cargo Connectivity API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase digital cargo booking share by making more shipment types workable through self-service quoting and booking.
Increase shipment milestone visibility coverage by exposing more reliable milestone and exception states.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase premium cargo product mix by improving trust in specialist product handling and visibility.
Increase cargo yield per available tonne by winning and retaining more high-value shipments.

productBricks.change: Extended Cargo Capacity, Quote & Booking with premium-product-aware booking rules and faster quote paths.
Extended Cargo Tracking & Exception Management with better milestone fidelity and alerting.
Extended Customer Care & Case Management with cargo-specific exception routing and escalation context.
Extended Partner & Alliance Journey Orchestration for cargo continuity on selected partner flows.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced richer quote, tracking, and premium-product visibility in the Cargo Digital Portal.
Introduced stronger shipment-state and booking-control pathways in the Cargo Connectivity API.
